rationale: Add missing alternatives to exercise deep dicts, lists, URLs, hooks, nested templates, copy patterns, and line endings

updates.replacement:
extra_context_object
    : '{}'
    | '{' extra_context_pair (',' extra_context_pair)* '}'
    ;

extra_context_pair
    : STRING ':' extra_context_value
    ;

extra_context_value
    : STRING                       // simple string
    | json_bool                    // boolean
    | choice_array                 // reuse existing array of strings
    | '[' extra_context_value (',' extra_context_value)* ']' // generic list
    | '{' extra_context_pair (',' extra_context_pair)* '}' // nested object
    ;

template_source
    : '"local"'
    | env_path
    | vcs_url
    | remote_zip_url
    ;

env_path
    : STRING   // e.g., "${HOME}/my_template" or "~/template"
    ;

vcs_url
    : STRING   // e.g., "git+https://example.com/repo.git"
    ;

remote_zip_url
    : STRING   // e.g., "https://example.com/template.zip"
    ;

hook_script
    : 'null'
    | '"from pathlib import Path\\nPath(\'HOOK_OK\').write_text(\'ok\', encoding=\'utf-8\')\\n"'
    | '"raise SystemExit(1)\\n"'
    | '"from pathlib import Path\\nPath(\'HOOK_OK\').write_text(\'ok\', encoding=\'utf-8\')\\nraise SystemExit(2)\\n"'
    ;

nested_templates_value
    : 'null'
    | '[' nested_template_entry ']'
    | '[' nested_template_entry ',' nested_template_entry ']'
    | '[' nested_template_entry ',' nested_template_entry ',' nested_template_entry ']'
    ;
